sections.paragraph:
Original: חשׁוּק חשׁק

Transliteration: châshûq châshûq

Phonetic: khaw-shook'

BDB Definition:

  1. fillets, binders
    1. rings clasping a pillar of the tabernacle or silver rods between the pillars

Origin: past participle of H2836

TWOT entry: 773b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
